subject: Re
title: Title
signed_copies_note: This document is made in 02 copies of equal legal value, one copy retained by each party.
quotation_intro: Dear Guest, AHSO is pleased to send you a detailed quotation for your project. We hope this solution meets the requirements you are looking for.
validity_period_note: This quotation is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.
vat_note: Price does not include VAT (8-10% depending on the item).
see_attached_quote: Please see the attached detailed quotation.
legal_preamble: Pursuant to the Civil Code No. 91/2015/QH13; Pursuant to the Commercial Law No. 36/2005/QH11;
after_agreement_statement: After discussion and agreement, both parties agree to sign the Economic Contract with the following terms and conditions:
article_4: ARTICLE 4: TIME AND PLACE OF DELIVERY
article_6: ARTICLE 6: RIGHTS AND OBLIGATIONS OF PARTY A
article_7: ARTICLE 7: RIGHTS AND OBLIGATIONS OF PARTY B
original_copies_statement: This contract takes effect from the date of signing. This contract is made into 04 original copies with the same legal validity, each party keeps 02 copies.
addendum_statement: Both parties agree to make and sign this Contract Addendum attached to the Economic Contract No. {{contractNo}} signed on {{date}}. This Addendum is an inseparable part of the Contract.
general_terms_content: Other terms and conditions of the Economic Contract remain unchanged and effective. Both parties commit to strictly implement the agreements in this Addendum.
nda_agreement_statement: Today, on {{date}}, at {{location}}, for the purpose of business cooperation, we are:
nda_purpose_content: The parties agree to review and provide each other with internal information for the purpose of evaluating the possibility of establishing a cooperative relationship or signing a commercial/service contract.
nda_scope_content: 'Confidential Information' includes but is not limited to: customer data, source code, business strategies, technological know-how, financial documents, and other information marked 'Confidential'. Whether exchanged in writing, electronic data or orally.
nda_responsibility_content: The receiving party commits to use the confidential information solely for the purpose specified in Article 1; Not to copy, disclose or provide to any third party without the written consent of the providing party.
nda_duration_content: This agreement is effective from the date of signing and remains in effect for 03 years from the end of negotiations or termination of the contract. The breaching party shall be liable to compensate for all direct and indirect damages arising from the breach.
delivery_statement: Today, on {{date}}, the parties hand over goods/documents in accordance with Economic Contract No. {{contractNo}}.
quality_status_desc: 100% brand new, strictly conforming to the specifications, categories and technical standards defined in the Contract.
handover_statement: Today, on {{date}}, the parties hand over documents and technical assets in accordance with Economic Contract No. {{contractNo}}.
handover_confirmation: The documents have been fully checked, verified and handed over. This minute is made into 02 original copies with equal legal validity, each party keeps 01 copy.
installation_statement: Today, on {{date}}, the parties install and deploy the system in accordance with Economic Contract No. {{contractNo}}.
installation_confirmation: The system has been installed, configured and tested to be operating stably in the real environment. This minute is made into 02 original copies with equal legal validity, each party keeps 01 copy.
acceptance_statement: Today, on {{date}}, the parties conduct the User Acceptance Testing (UAT) for the system under Economic Contract No. {{contractNo}}.
acceptance_confirmation: The system fully meets the technical and business requirements in accordance with the Contract appendix. Both parties agree to accept and put it into official use. This minute is made into 02 original copies with equal legal validity, each party keeps 01 copy.
partial_acceptance_statement: Today, on {{date}}, the parties conduct the partial acceptance for the project phase under Economic Contract No. {{contractNo}}.
partial_acceptance_confirmation: The parties confirm that the work contents of the above phase have been completed. Both parties shall proceed with the payment procedures corresponding to this phase. This minute is made into 02 original copies with equal legal validity, each party keeps 01 copy.
warranty_cert_statement: Certify that the software system under Contract No. {{contractNo}} has been handed over and the warranty is officially effective.
warranty_conditions_desc: Free warranty for errors arising from programming or design techniques of the base system. No warranty for errors caused by user's incorrect operation procedures, or hardware, internal network, server incidents from the Customer's side.
maintenance_statement: Today, on {{date}}, the parties conduct maintenance and technical support for the system under Contract No. {{contractNo}}.
maintenance_confirmation: The system is operating stably after maintenance. Both parties agree to this maintenance result.
payment_request_content: We kindly request your company to pay the amount below in accordance with the contract schedule.
receipt_confirmation: The above amount has been received in full. This receipt is made in 02 copies, one for the collector and one for the payer.
ar_recon_statement: Based on the contract and actual transactions, both parties conduct the AR reconciliation as follows:
ar_confirmation: Both parties have reconciled and agreed on the above AR figures. This minute is made in 02 copies with equal legal validity.
